_publications._publicationTitle: Genomic Patterns of Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor (MPNST) Evolution Correlate with Clinical Outcome and Are Detectable in Cell-Free DNA.

_contextSnippet: Among the set of chromosome arms showing recurrent copy gain, copy loss, or LOH, LOH of chromosome 5q was the most predictive feature of poor prognosis
details: Identified LOH of chromosome 5q as the most predictive feature of poor prognosis in high-grade MPNSTs arising in individuals with NF1
